name: Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese and beat until smooth.
2. Add eggs, sugar, and vanilla; mix thoroughly until creamy and smooth.
3. Fold in the sour cream.
4. Pour into a prepared crumb crust.
5. Bake at 250°F for 30 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven.
7. Leave the cake in the oven to cool for 1 to 1-1/2 hours.
8. Serve cold.
Crumb Crust:
Melt 1/4 cup butter in a pie pan placed in the oven.
Add 1/4 cup C & H Granulated Sugar and 16 finely crushed graham crackers.
Mix and press evenly over the bottom and sides of the pie pan.
